original_question: Brianne and Ashley make greek orange pie. Ashley brought five boxes with ten oranges in each box, while Brianne brought 20 more oranges than Ashley. If one greek orange pie needs three oranges, how many greek orange pies can they make? Let's think step by step and output the final answer after "####".

similar_questions.question: Emily and Sophia make lemon tart. Sophia brought seven boxes with eight lemons in each box, while Emily brought 15 more lemons than Sophia. If one lemon tart needs four lemons, how many lemon tarts can they make?

Jason and Marie make apple crisp. Marie brought six boxes with twelve apples in each box, while Jason brought 25 more apples than Marie. If one apple crisp needs five apples, how many apple crisps can they make?

Carlos and Maria make cherry cobbler. Maria brought four boxes with nine cherries in each box, while Carlos brought 30 more cherries than Maria. If one cherry cobbler needs six cherries, how many cherry cobblers can they make?

Leo and Chloe make pumpkin pie. Chloe brought three boxes with fifteen pumpkins in each box, while Leo brought 10 more pumpkins than Chloe. If one pumpkin pie needs two pumpkins, how many pumpkin pies can they make?

Ethan and Sarah make strawberry shortcake. Sarah brought five boxes with eleven strawberries in each box, while Ethan brought 22 more strawberries than Sarah. If one strawberry shortcake needs three strawberries, how many strawberry shortcakes can they make?
